from pyspark.sql.functions import col, split

dyf = dfc.select(list(dfc.keys())[0])
df = dyf.toDF()

# SKU Category (text before first "-")
df = df.withColumn(
    "SKU Category",
    split(col("ProductSKU"), "-").getItem(0)
)

# SKU Type (text after first "-")
df = df.withColumn(
    "SKU Type",
    split(col("ProductSKU"), "-").getItem(1)
)

# Discount Price (90% of product price)
df = df.withColumn(
    "Discount Price",
    col("ProductPrice") * 0.9
)

new_dyf = DynamicFrame.fromDF(df, glueContext, "new_dyf")

return DynamicFrameCollection({"output": new_dyf}, glueContext)","Inputs":["node-1773535396828"],"Name":"Custom
